headline: American Express Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend on Common Shares
summary: NEW YORK, June 04, 2026--The Board of Directors of American Express Company (NYSE: AXP) declared a regular quarterly dividend of $0.95 per common share, payable on August 10, 2026, to shareholders of record on July 2, 2026.

headline: Nasdaq Ticks Higher. Dow Climbs More Than 800 Points in Broad Rally.
summary: The Dow surged back to record levels on Thursday as big financial stocks provided a boost.  The blue-chip index rose 814 points or 1.6%, on pace for a closing high and its biggest percentage gain since April.  If the Dow closes at a record today, it would mark its 15th record in 2026.

headline: Is It Time To Reassess American Express (AXP) After This Year’s Share Price Pullback?
summary: If you are wondering whether American Express stock is offering good value at its current price, you first need a clear view of how its fundamentals line up with what the market is willing to pay. The stock closed at US$300.57 recently, with the share price down 3.8% over the past week, down 5.8% over the past month, down 19.4% year to date, but still showing a 2.6% return over 1 year, 81.5% over 3 years and 94.6% over 5 years. headline: Delta and American Express Add More Travel Value to Delta SkyMiles Cards
summary: NEW YORK, June 04, 2026--American Express® (NYSE: AXP) and Delta Air Lines® (NYSE: DAL) today introduced new travel benefits for eligible Delta SkyMiles® Card Members, along with refreshed Card designs across the full portfolio and welcome offers for new Card Members, adding more value with no increase to the annual fee.
